assertions.claim: Synthesize the TaskPRO platform from canonical knowledge into a TurboRepo monorepo: an Expo/React Native mobile application (customer and technician roles) with a Supabase backend, delivered in the BUILD-001 phase order, each phase producing a usable vertical slice.
assertions.derivation_note: BUILD-001 defines phase order and vertical-slice philosophy; MOD-001 defines the TurboRepo target structure; TECH-001 locks the stack; CAP-001 and the UI asset groups establish the two-role (customer/technician) scope. No element of this claim originates outside the evidence set.

in_scope: apps/api (Supabase Edge Functions, jobs, webhooks, provider adapters)
packages/* (ui, design-tokens, domain, sdk, config, eslint, types, testing)
out_of_scope: English and Portuguese locales (marked future in TASKPRO-I18N-001)
